productDisplayName: Puma Men Future Cat Yellow Casual Shoes
description: Designed for everyday wear, the puma cat range of everyday sneakers embodies excitement and energy for life. The Future Cat M1 comes with synthetic overlays on the sides with a textured backfoot finish. The outsole with horizontal grips makes these shoes very comfortable and durable while providing excellent grip, making it perfect for urban wear.UpperFeatures a low-profile design for durabilityPremium leather upper for longer wearBold, contrasting form-stripe outliningLightly padded tongue and collar with branding for extra comfortAsymmetrical lacing system gives a snug FitTextile lining with cushioned footbed for enhanced comfortRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticEmbroidered Formstripe with brand badge on the lateral foot, embroidered puma Cat on the medial foot and cat logo embossed on the lateral toeMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort, impact protection and stabilityOutsoleTPR outsole for enhanced tractionEmbedded Puma Future Cat embedded on the rubber outsoleOutsole reinforced onto the upper as a heel guard
